docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Popover

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.Popover do use Phoenix.Component alias Phoenix.LiveView.JS def show_popover(id) do %JS{} |> JS.show(to: "##{id}-backdrop") |> JS.show( to: "##{id}-content", transition: {"ease-out duration-150", "opacity-0 scale-95", "opacity-100 scale-100"}, time: 150 ) end def hide_popover(id) do %JS{} |> JS.hide(to: "##{id}-backdrop") |> JS.hide( to: "##{id}-content", transition: {"ease-in duration-100", "opacity-100 scale-100", "opacity-0 scale-95"}, time: 100 ) end attr :id, :string, required: true attr :class, :string, default: nil slot :trigger, required: true slot :inner_block, required: true def popover(assigns) do ~H"""
JS.toggle(to: "##{@id}-backdrop")}> {render_slot(@trigger)}
{render_slot(@inner_block)}
""" end end

name: popover
title: Popover
